overview.description: Abstract DB (MariaDB) Data-Driven Test with dynamic expected files
overview.name: MariaDB Variations Test

sqlDatabase.comment: Create table and clear previous data for the current ID
sqlDatabase.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_news ( id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(100), category VARCHAR(50) )

sqlDatabase.comment: Insert dynamic data to table for user id {{id}}
sqlDatabase.query: INSERT INTO test_news (id, title, category) VALUES ({{id}}, '{{title}}', '{{category}}')

sqlDatabase.comment: Read data from table using variations
Clean up data after test iteration
